creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
On Wed, Aug 12, 1998 at 04:23:39AM +0900, SADA Kenji wrote:
> BTW, now, I've got a new ppp-port (2.2.7-RELEASE base), that has another
> nat-extentison (could through many protocols than the original alias
> function), and time scheduling function (stops on-demand dialing while
> the time specified by the user).
> Could I send the new version port ? How do you think ?

I would send the changes directly to Brian Somers <brian@freebsd.org> and
see if they could just become part of the standard ijj-ppp.

-- 
-- David    (obrien@NUXI.ucdavis.edu  -or-  obrien@FreeBSD.org)
